description:
The midir crate requires alsa-sys on Linux, but flake.nix doesn't provide
ALSA headers. The CLI and any native MIDI functionality will fail to compile
on Linux.

Fix: Add pkgs.alsa-lib (or alsa-lib.dev) to devShells conditionally for
Linux systems. Verify with nix develop on a Linux host.
title: Add Linux ALSA dependencies to Nix flake
